project_privacy_data_flows.data_type: 文章离线缓存数据（HTML内容、媒体列表、图片、CSS、JS）
project_privacy_data_flows.description: 用户保存文章供离线阅读时，文章HTML、媒体资源、CSS和JS文件被下载并缓存到本地文件系统和Core Data

flow_steps.code: func add(url: URL, groupKey: CacheController.ItemKey, individualCompletion: @escaping CacheController.IndividualCompletion, groupCompletion: @escaping CacheController.GroupCompletion)
flow_steps.details: 触发文章离线缓存，传入文章URL和分组键

flow_steps.code:
mobileHTMLRequest = try self.articleFetcher.mobileHTMLRequest(articleURL: url)
mobileHTMLMediaListRequest = try self.articleFetcher.mobileHTMLMediaListRequest(articleURL: url)
flow_steps.details: 构建文章HTML和媒体列表请求
从Wikimedia Page Content Service下载文章HTML、图片、CSS和JS文件
下载的内容通过cacheResponse存储到Permanent Cache文件系统目录

flow_steps.code:
guard let cacheItem = CacheDBWriterHelper.cacheItem(with: itemKey, variant: nil, in: self.context) else { ... }
cacheItem.isDownloaded = true
flow_steps.details: 在Cache Core Data中标记项目为已下载，包含项目键、变体信息和HTTP响应头

project_privacy_data_flows.data_type: 文章图片数据（从图片URL下载）
project_privacy_data_flows.description: 文章中包含的图片被下载并同时缓存在文件系统和内存NSCache中

flow_steps.code: let task = self.imageFetcher.dataForURL(schemedURL, persistType: .image, headers: acceptAnyContentType) { ... }

flow_steps.details: 图片同时存储在内存缓存（上限1000万像素）和文件系统Permanent Cache目录中

project_privacy_data_flows.data_type: 缓存元数据（项目键、下载状态、变体信息、URL、HTTP头）
project_privacy_data_flows.description: 缓存的每个资源在Cache Core Data中存储元数据，记录下载状态和HTTP响应信息

flow_steps.details: 存储缓存项目的语言变体信息和HTTP Vary响应头到Cache Core Data

flow_steps.code: // Creates CacheGroup in Core Data with groupKey, date, and associated CacheItems

project_privacy_data_flows.data_type: 下载失败状态（错误类型、重试次数、重试日期）
project_privacy_data_flows.description: 离线保存失败时记录错误状态到WMFArticle Core Data实体，用于后续重试

flow_steps.code:
article.error = .apiFailed
article.downloadAttemptCount = newAttemptCount
article.downloadRetryDate = Date(timeIntervalSinceNow: TimeInterval(integerLiteral: secondsFromNowToAttempt))
flow_steps.details: 下载失败时记录错误类型、递增重试次数并设置下次重试日期到WMFArticle Core Data实体
重试日期存储到WMFArticle实体，用于后续自动重试下载

project_privacy_data_flows.data_type: 文章元数据（URL、标题等）写入iOS Spotlight索引
project_privacy_data_flows.description: 文章成功离线保存后，添加到iOS系统Spotlight搜索索引，允许用户通过系统搜索找到文章

flow_steps.details: 文章缓存成功后设置isDownloaded为true
文章URL被添加到iOS Core Spotlight索引，允许通过系统搜索访问
